metadata.name: Extract Table Data from PDF Reports

description: An agent must extract specific data tables from a collection of PDF market research reports.

nodes.task_description: For each PDF in a given folder, identify any pages that contain tables.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly lists the page numbers containing tables for each PDF.

nodes.task_description: Extract the identified tables into a structured format (e.g., CSV or JSON).

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully extracts all tables into separate CSV files.

nodes.task_description: Consolidate the data from all the extracted tables into a single master CSV file.

expected_outcome.value: Agent merges all the individual CSVs into one file.
